page.content: In Table 1, the headers include TWINSCAN2.03 and TWINSCAN_EST with subheaders Blank ESTseq, 10% with ESTseq masked, and 90% with ESTseq unmasked. Under the row label Gene_sn, the values are 60.6, 61.3, 63.0, and 74.7; for Gene_sp, the values are 58.6, 59.8, 60.5, and 71.5; in Exon_sn, the values are 86.9, 86.2, 86.4, and 91.5; and finally, Exon_sp has values 79.5, 80.8, 81.1, and 87.0.
